_comment: Final chosen HP per arch (heavy backbones, v6.1-same-area-split) — best-val_mIoU winners from the mt_base sweep (exp 16). deeplabv3plus_cbam/resnet50: SGD lr5e-03 cosine wu3 bs8 (val 0.6498 / test 0.6660). segformer/mit_b2: AdamW lr6e-05 wd1e-2 cosine wu5 grad_clip1.0 bs8 (val 0.6787 / test 0.6893).
